name: Assassinate
desc: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 50% crit chance.

name: Assassinate2
desc:
A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 100% crit chance.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Boost Backstab
desc: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage and ignore shield.

name: BoostBackstab2
desc: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage, ignore shield, and inflict Bleed and Poison.

name: Poison Gas
desc: Inflict Poison 2 on all units adjacent to you.

name: PoisonGas2
desc: Inflict Poison 4 on all units adjacent to you (even diagonally).

name: Poison Nail
desc: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison and ignores shield.

name: PoisonNail2
desc: Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison and ignore shield.

name: Weakening Nail
desc: Throw a nail that inflicts Weakness and ignores shield.

name: WeakeningNail2
desc: Throw 2 nails that inflict Weakness and ignore shield.

name: Sharp Nail
desc: Throw a nail that inflicts Bleed and ignores shield.

name: SharpNail2
desc: Throw 2 nails that inflict Bleed and ignore shield.

name: Coin Toss
desc:
Throw a coin that deals damage.
RELOAD: Collect a coin.
[s:.7]This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.[/s]

name: CoinToss2
desc:
Throw a coin at infinite range with +50% crit chance that ignores shield.
RELOAD: Collect a coin.
[s:.7]This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.[/s]

name: Move Again
desc: Refresh your movement action.

name: MoveAgain2
desc:
Refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Rearm
desc: Refresh your basic attack.

name: AttackAgain2
desc:
Refresh your basic attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Camouflage
desc: Gain Stealth.

name: Camouflage2
desc: Gain Stealth. Attacking while stealthed has a 100% critical hit chance.

name: Shadow
desc:
Teleport behind a unit.
[s:.7]Nothin' personnel, kid.[/s]

name: Shadow2
desc:
Teleport behind a unit. Your next action has +100% crit chance.
[s:.7]Nothin' personnel, kid.[/s]

name: Time Walk
desc:
Take an extra turn at the end of the round.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: TimeWalk2
desc:
Take an extra turn at the end of the round.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns. This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Distract
desc: Make a unit face away from you.

name: Distract2
desc: Make any unit look away from you. This has a 33% chance to inflict Confusion.

name: Rebound
desc: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles.

name: Rebound2
desc: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles. Deal damage to any unit you collide with.

name: Cut Purse
desc: Throw a nail that knocks coins out of units it hits and ignores shield.

name: CutPurse2
desc: Throw 2 nails that knock coins out of units they hit and ignore shield.

name: Eagle Eye
desc: Spawn 2-3 coins on random tiles.

name: EagleEye2
desc: Spawn 3-7 coins on random tiles.

name: Pickpocket
desc: Steal 1-3 coins from a unit and give it -1 Damage.

name: PickPocket2
desc: Steal 3-5 coins from a unit, give it -1 Damage, and apply some extra debuffs at random.

name: Backflip
desc: Backflip out of the way the next time you're targeted by an enemy.

name: Backflip2
desc:
Backflip out of the way the next time you're targeted by an enemy.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Blur
desc:
Gain +10% dodge chance.
Disable this spell if you have more than 65% dodge chance.

name: Blur2
desc:
Gain +15% dodge chance. 
Disable this spell if you have more than 80% dodge chance.

name: Greedstep
desc: Teleport to a tile with coins on it.

name: GreedStep2
desc: Teleport to a tile with coins on it, then spawn 1-2 coins on random tiles.

name: Stalk
desc:
Target any enemy. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Stalk2
desc:
Target any enemy. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. Costs 0 mana.)[/s]

name: Nail Flurry
desc: Throw 10 1-damage nails that ignore shield.

name: NailFlurry2
desc: Throw 10 1-damage nails that ignore shield. Throw extra nails equal to your [img:dex].

name: Declaw
desc: A melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.

name: Declaw2
desc: A 2-hit melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.

name: Quick Roll
desc:
Roll in a straight line up to three tiles.
RELOAD: Backstab a unit.

name: QuickRoll2
desc:
Roll in a straight or diagonal line up to five tiles.
RELOAD: Backstab a unit.

name: Slice
desc: A melee attack that has all effects of your basic attack and ignores shield.

name: Slice2
desc:
A melee attack that has all effects of your basic attack and ignores shield.
[s:.7](This spell is free the 1st time you use it each turn.)[/s]

name: Pocket Sand
desc: Inflict Blind on all units in a small cone.

name: PocketSand2
desc: Inflict Blind 2 on all units in a larger cone.

name: Nightshade
desc: Inflict Poison 4 on an adjacent unit.

name: Nightshade2
desc:
Inflict Poison 4 on an adjacent unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Shadow Shift
desc:
Teleport exactly 2 tiles away, leaving behind a shadow that mimics your basic attack.
[s:.7](The shadow fades at the end of your turn.)[/s]

name: Shadowshift2
desc:
Teleport up to 3 tiles away, leaving behind a shadow that mimics your basic attack.
[s:.7](The shadow fades at the end of your turn.)[/s]

name: Slingshade
desc:
Spawn a shadow up to 3 tiles away that mimics your basic attack.
[s:.7](The shadow fades at the end of your turn.)[/s]

name: SlingShade2
desc:
Spawn a shadow up to 5 tiles away that mimics your basic attack.
[s:.7](The shadow fades at the end of your turn.)[/s]
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Caltrops
desc: Move up to 4 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.

name: Caltrops2
desc: Move up to 10 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.

name: Pierce Shot
desc: Throw a nail that passes through units and ignores shield.

name: PierceShot2
desc: Throw an infinite range nail that passes through units and ignores shield.

name: Cheat
desc: Gain temporary +5 [img:lck] until your next turn.

name: Cheat2
desc: Gain temporary +10 [img:lck] until your next turn.

name: Venom Barrage
desc: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison 1 and ignores shield at each enemy in your line of sight.

name: VenomBarrage2
desc: Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison 1 and ignore shield at each enemy in your line of sight.

name: Loot Corpse
desc:
Loot 1-3 coins from a body... and possibly something else?
[s:.7](This might destroy the body)[/s]

name: LootCorpse2
desc:
Loot 1-3 coins from a body... and possibly something else?
[s:.7](This might not destroy the body)[/s]
[s:.7](Your chance of finding "something else" is significantly increased.)[/s]

name: Sever Artery
desc: A weak melee attack. If this crits, inflict Bleed 5.

name: SeverArtery2
desc: A weak melee attack. If this crits inflict Bleed 5 and you gain All Stats Up.

name: Fade
desc: Gain Stealth 1.

name: Fade2
desc: Gain Stealth 2.

name: Sharpen Nail
desc: Gain +1 [img:dex] and +1 Range until the end of the battle.

name: SharpenNail2
desc:
Gain +1 [img:dex] and +1 Range until the end of the battle.
[s:.7]Automatically cast this spell at the end of each round for free.[/s]

name: Sneak Up
desc: Teleport directly behind a random enemy.

name: SneakUp2
desc:
Teleport directly behind a random enemy.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Shank
desc: An attack that hits 2 times from behind.

name: Shank2
desc: An attack that hits 3 times from behind.

name: Steal Kidney
desc: A melee attack with increased critical hit chance. If this crits and your trinket slot is empty, gain a kidney, then inflict Bleed 1.

name: StealKidney2
desc: A melee attack with increased critical hit chance that inflicts Bleed and Bruise 1. If this crits and your trinket slot is empty, gain a kidney, then inflict Bleed 1.

name: Steal Luck
desc: A weak melee attack. If this crits, inflict -1 [img:lck] and you gain +1 [img:lck].

name: Steal Luck
desc: A weak melee attack that inflicts -1 [img:lck] and you gain +1 [img:lck].

name: Over Here, Over There
desc:
Swap positions with an ally. Swap back at the end of your turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: ThiefSwap2
desc:
Swap positions with any unit. Swap back at the end of your turn. If the unit was an enemy, inflict Confusion 1.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Pierce
desc: Gain +2 Range. Your attacks pass through units and ignore shield for the rest of the turn.

name: Pierce2
desc:
Gain +4 Range. Your attacks pass through units and ignore shield for the rest of the turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Wind Up
desc: Gain +1 Range for the rest of the turn.

name: WindUp2
desc: Gain +1 Range.

name: Triple Nails
desc: Throw 3 nails straight and diagonally in front of you. These nails have the effects of your basic attack and ignore shield.

name: TripleNails2
desc: Throw 3 nails straight and diagonally in front of you 2 times. These nails have the effects of your basic attack and ignore shield.

name: Skin Disguise
desc:
Destroy an adjacent body. Enemies won't attack you until your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: SkinDisguise2
desc:
Destroy a body in range 3. Enemies won't attack you until your next turn.
[s:.7](This spell is free. Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Chakram
desc: Throw a projectile that passes through units and then returns to you. This can collect pickups.

name: Chakram2
desc: Throw a projectile that passes through units and then returns to you. At its apex, it deals increased damage and always crits. This can collect pickups.

name: Jitter
desc: Inflict Confusion 1 on each adjacent unit.

name: Jitter2
desc: Inflict Confusion 1 on each unit within 3 tiles of you.

name: Steal Time
desc: A melee attack. If this crits, refresh your basic attack and movement actions.

name: StealTime2
desc: A melee attack with +30% crit chance. If this crits, refresh your basic attack and movement actions.

name: Outskirts
desc: Teleport to a tile on the edge of the map.

name: Outskirts2
desc: Teleport to a tile on the edge of the map. Gain +2 Damage for the rest of the turn.

name: Poison Dip
desc:
Spend all your mana. For every 5 mana spent, your basic attack inflicts +1 Poison.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: PoisonDip2
desc:
Spend all your mana. For every 3 mana spent, your basic attack inflicts +1 Poison.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Lucky Penny
desc: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +2 [img:lck] instead of its normal effects.

name: LuckyPenny2
desc: Collect a pickup within four tiles of you. Gain +2 [img:lck] instead of its normal effects.
